title: Align CoAP messaging resource paths across LCI, apps spec, and Python
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-py4c.1.2 review. Messaging resource paths are split: spec/11-lci.md defines optional POST /msg and GET /msg/inbox Observe, spec/12-apps.md and README define POST /msg/inbox, GET /msg/inbox Observe, /msg/sent, and /msg/ack, while python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py currently exposes /messages. Decide the authoritative LCI/native-client messaging contract, update specs/docs/code/discovery/link-format, and cover Python TUI probing/fallback tests. No hardware required.
notes:
Evidence from project-LICHEN-py4c.1.2 review: spec/11-lci.md section 17.5.6 defines POST /msg and GET /msg/inbox Observe with CBOR messages. python/src/lichen/coap/resources.py currently defines MessagesResource as observable /messages with GET/POST using from/to/text/t fields. The Python TUI screen map now treats /msg and /msg/inbox as authoritative production LCI and permits /messages only as explicitly labeled legacy/demo until this Bead resolves the mismatch.
Additional evidence from final review: spec/12-apps.md section 18.1.2 defines POST coap://[destination]/msg/inbox for send, GET /msg/inbox Observe for receive, and resource summary includes /msg/inbox GET,POST, /msg/sent, /msg/ack. README examples also use POST /msg/inbox. project-LICHEN-py4c.1.2 now avoids hard-coding /msg as final and requires discovery/labeling until this Bead reconciles /msg, /msg/inbox, and /messages.
No-hardware implementation evidence (2026-07-02): aligned messaging contract on POST/GET/Observe /msg/inbox across spec/11-lci.md, README, docs/python-native-tui-support.md, Meshtastic compatibility docs, Python LciClient, native TUI defaults/CLI, dashboard fetches, and Python CoAP resources. Python MessagesResource now serves canonical /msg/inbox with {messages:[...]} GET payload, accepts body-based LCI POSTs plus legacy text fields, returns 2.01 Created with Location-Path /msg/sent/{id}, mounts /msg/sent collection and dynamic /msg/sent/{id} details, and keeps /messages only as rt=legacy.messages demo alias with Observe notifications preserved. Added/updated contract guards and targeted CoAP/client/TUI/dashboard tests. Created follow-up project-LICHEN-py4c.1.19 for optional /msg/ack delivery receipt resource implementation.
Validation evidence (2026-07-02, local no-hardware): from python/: uv run pytest tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py tests/client/test_lci.py tests/tui/test_native.py tests/client/test_ip_coap.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py -q => 104 passed, 1 warning (StarletteDeprecationWarning in tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py:10 about httpx/starlette.testclient). uv run ruff check src/lichen/client/lci.py src/lichen/coap/resources.py src/lichen/tui/native.py src/lichen/dashboard/app.py src/lichen/interface/meshtastic/translate.py tests/coap/test_messages_resource.py tests/client/test_lci.py tests/tui/test_native.py tests/dashboard/test_dashboard.py tests/test_lci_contract_docs.py => All checks passed. repo root: git diff --check => passed. Stale-path rg for POST /msg, /msg/outbox, send_path="/msg", CoAP POST /msg showed only intended /msg/inbox, /msg/ack, /msg/store references and tests. No EC2 used; changes are Python/docs only.
Review evidence (2026-07-02): explorer Descartes recommended authoritative POST/GET/Observe /msg/inbox, 2.01 Location-Path /msg/sent/{id}, legacy /messages only as demo/legacy. Explorer Cicero mapped Python defaults/resources/tests and warned /messages must not advertise rt=msg.inbox. Review Dirac found P2 stale docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md /msg references; fixed and added guard. Review Schrodinger found P1 missing /msg/sent resource despite Location-Path and P2 legacy /messages losing Observe; fixed with /msg/sent collection/detail resources and ObservableResource legacy alias. Narrow re-reviews Schrodinger and Dirac both reported no remaining P0-P2 findings.
close_reason: Completed no-hardware reconciliation: /msg/inbox is authoritative for send/receive/Observe across LCI docs, apps alignment, Python client/TUI/dashboard defaults, and CoAP resource implementation. /messages is legacy/demo only with rt=legacy.messages and Observe preserved. /msg/sent collection/detail is mounted for Created Location-Path. Validation: 104 targeted Python tests passed with one known Starlette deprecation warning, Ruff passed, git diff --check passed. Two final re-reviews reported no remaining P0-P2 findings.
